Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We see three distinct patient profiles based on age and gender Patient A age 45 male M Patient B age 62 female F Patient C age 28 male M

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We also see that each patient has a registration event events 1 2 3 So likely three cases

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets group events by patient age and patient gender

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Patient 45M Event 1 Register patient ER age 45 M Event 4 Initial triage ER age 45 M Event 7 X ray imaging Radiology age 45 M Event 12 Doctor consultation ER age 45 M Event 15 Patient discharged ER age 45 M

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Patient 62F Event 2 Register patient ER age 62 F Event 5 Initial triage ER age 62 F Event 8 Lab test requested ER age 62 F Event 10 Lab test completed Laboratory age 62 F Event 11 Doctor consultation ER age 62 F Event 14 Prescription created ER age 62 F Event 17 Patient discharged ER age 62 F

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Patient 28M Event 3 Register patient Surgery age 28 M Event 6 Doctor consultation Surgery age 28 M Event 9 Surgery preparation Surgery age 28 M Event 13 Surgery performed Surgery age 28 M Event 16 Recovery room Surgery age 28 M Event 18 Patient discharged Surgery age 28 M

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check if there are any events that could belong to multiple All events are uniquely assigned by age and gender

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For 45M registration is in ER and all other events except X ray are in ER X ray is in Radiology which is a service department that ER patients often use So it is plausible

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For 62F all events are in ER or Laboratory lab test completed The lab test requested is from ER and completed in Laboratory but it is for the same patient

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We should also check the logical order For each case the activities make sense For example for 45M Register Triage X ray Doctor consultation Discharge For 62F Register Triage Lab test requested Lab test completed Doctor consultation Prescription Discharge For 28M Register in Surgery Doctor consultation Surgery preparation Surgery performed Recovery room Discharge All consistent

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus we have three cases We can assign Case IDs arbitrarily eg Case 1 for 45M Case 2 for 62F Case 3 for 28M
